name: AsciiDoc Zero-Network Preview
description: Local AsciiDoc preview for Chrome and Edge with MathJax, Mermaid, PlantUML, and Kroki-compatible diagrams.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'none'; connect-src https://api.github.com https://raw.githubusercontent.com; img-src 'self' data: file: http: https:; font-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval';
